chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI ITC No.504 of 2004 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of case 04.03.2025 Barrister Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, Advocate for the Applicant ************ On 21.01.2021, following order was passed_ “Learned Counsel for the Applicant is directed to take necessary steps for bringing on record the legal heirs of the deceased Respondent, who as evident from order dated 24.09.2020, has passed away. Let such exercise be complied before the next date. ” Today, Counsel has filed a statement of the concerned official of the Applicant, which states that the whereabouts of the deceased Respondent are not known; hence, Department is not in a position to supply any fresh address. In view of such position, this Income Tax Case is dismissed for non-prosecution. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
